case_title: KAREN BROCK VS. VISA U.S.A., INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MARIO N. ALIOTO IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROCK, KAREN INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROCK, KAREN INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VISA U.S.A., INC. SEE SCANNED DOC

BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROCK, KAREN INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED AS TO DEFENDANT VISA U.S.A., INC. MASTERCARD INTERNATIONAL, INC. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-18-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-15-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-03-2004 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE CLASS ACTION
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-18-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-18-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. JCC CASE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
